user.title: Set up Trunkrs
user.description:
Enter the postal code your parcels are delivered to. Trunkrs identifies a parcel by its Trunkrs number together with the delivery postal code, so this is used as the default for every parcel you add.

You add parcels after setup.

data_description.postal_code: e.g. 1234AB. Used as the default delivery address for parcels you add.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to reach Trunkrs. Check your network.
error.invalid_postcode: Enter a valid Dutch postal code, e.g. 1234AB.

abort.already_configured: A Trunkrs hub for this postal code is already set up.

data_description.add: Enter a Trunkrs number to start tracking it. It uses the hub postal code, and is checked with Trunkrs before it is added.

data_description.delivered_filter_type: Show delivered parcels from the last X days, or limit to the X most recent.
data_description.delivered_filter_amount: Number of days or parcels to show.

data_description.include_history: Add a per-parcel history attribute listing each status update (timestamp, status, original text). Off by default.

data_description.refresh_interval: How often the integration checks Trunkrs for parcel updates. A slower interval is gentler on Trunkrs's API; the default of 30 minutes is plenty for most parcels.

error.invalid_trunkrs_nr: That does not look like a Trunkrs number.
error.already_tracked: That parcel is already being tracked.
error.unknown_parcel: Trunkrs does not recognise this number for the hub postal code. Check both.

track_parcel.name: Track parcel
track_parcel.description: Start tracking a Trunkrs parcel by its number.

trunkrs_nr.name: Trunkrs number
trunkrs_nr.description: The Trunkrs number of the parcel.

postal_code.name: Postal code
postal_code.description: Delivery postal code. Picks the hub when several are set up; otherwise defaults to the only hub.

untrack_parcel.name: Untrack parcel
untrack_parcel.description: Stop tracking a Trunkrs parcel by its number.

trunkrs_nr.name: Trunkrs number
trunkrs_nr.description: The Trunkrs number to stop tracking.

trigger_type.parcel_delivery_time_changed: A parcel's expected delivery time changed
